text: Alif, Lām, Rā. [This is] a Book whose verses are perfected and then presented in detail from [one who is] Wise and Aware
tl: Alif-Laaam-Raa; Kitaabun uhkimat Aayaatuhoo summa fussilat mil ladun Hakeemin Khabeer

text: [Through a messenger, saying], \"Do not worship except Allāh. Indeed, I am to you from Him a warner and a bringer of good tidings,\"
tl: Allaa ta'budooo illal laah; innanee lakum minhu nazeerunw Wa-basheer

text: And [saying], \"Seek forgiveness of your Lord and repent to Him, [and] He will let you enjoy a good provision for a specified term and give every doer of favor his favor [i.e., reward]. But if you turn away, then indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a great Day.
tl: Wa-anis taghfiroo Rabbakum summa toobooo ilaihi yumatti'kum mataa'an hasanan ilaaa ajalim musammanw Wa-yu'ti kulla zee fadlin fadlahoo Wa-in tawallaw fa-inneee akhaafu 'alaikum 'azaaba Yawmin Kabeer

text: To Allāh is your return, and He is over all things competent.\"
tl: Ilal laahi marji'ukum Wa-Huwa 'alaa kulli shai'in Qadeer

text: Unquestionably, they [i.e., the disbelievers] turn away their breasts to hide themselves from him. Unquestionably, [even] when they cover themselves in their clothing, He [i.e., Allāh] knows what they conceal and what they declare. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
tl: Alaa innahum yasnoona sudoorahum liyastakhfoo minh; alaa heena yastaghshoona siyaabahum ya'lamu maa yusirroona Wa-maa yu'linoon; innahoo 'aleemun bizaatis sudoor

text: And there is no creature on earth but that upon Allāh is its provision, and He knows its place of dwelling and place of storage. All is in a clear register.
tl: Wa-maa min daaabbatin fil ardi illaa 'alal laahi rizquhaa Wa-ya'lamu mustaqarrahaa Wa-mustawda'ahaa; kullun fee Kitaabim Mubeen

text: And it is He who created the heavens and the earth in six days - and His Throne had been upon water - that He might test you as to which of you is best in deed. But if you say, \"Indeed, you are resurrected after death,\" those who disbelieve will surely say, \"This is not but obvious magic.\"
tl: Wa-Huwal lazee khalaqas samaawaati wal-arda fee sittati aiyaaminw Wa-kaana 'Arshuhoo alal maaa'i liyabluwakum aiyyukum ahsanu 'amalaa; Wa-la'in qulta innakum mab'oosoona min ba'dil mawti la-yaqoolannal lazeena kafaroo in haazaaa illaa sihrum mubeen

text: And if We hold back from them the punishment for a limited time, they will surely say, \"What detains it?\" Unquestionably, on the Day it comes to them, it will not be averted from them, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
tl: Wala'in akharnaa 'anhumul 'azaaba ilaaa ummatim ma'doodatil la-yaqoolunna maa yahbisuh; alaa yawma ya'teehim laisa masroofan 'anhum Wa-haaqa bihim maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: And if We give man a taste of mercy from Us and then We withdraw it from him, indeed, he is despairing and ungrateful.
tl: Wa-la'in azaqnal insaana minnaa rahmatan summa naza'naahaa minhu, innahoo laya'oosun kafoor

text: But if We give him a taste of favor after hardship has touched him, he will surely say, \"Bad times have left me.\" Indeed, he is exultant and boastful -
tl: Wala'in azaqnaahu na'maaa'a ba'da darraaa'a massat-hu la-yaqoolanna zahabas saiyiaatu 'anneee; innahoo lafarihun fakhoor

text: Except for those who are patient and do righteous deeds; those will have forgiveness and great reward.
tl: Illal lazeena sabaroo Wa-'amilus saalihaati ulaaa'ika lahum maghfiratunw Wa-ajrun kabeer

text: Then would you possibly leave [out] some of what is revealed to you, or is your breast constrained by it because they say, \"Why has there not been sent down to him a treasure or come with him an angel?\" But you are only a warner. And Allāh is Disposer of all things.
tl: Fala'allaka taarikum ba'da maa yoohaaa ilaika Wa-daaa'iqum bihee sadruka aien yaqooloo law-laaa unzila 'alaihi kanzun aw jaaa'a ma'ahoo malak; innamaa anta nazeer; wallaahu 'alaa kulli shai'inw wakeel

text: Or do they say, \"He invented it\"? Say, \"Then bring ten sūrahs like it that have been invented and call upon [for assistance] whomever you can besides Allāh, if you should be truthful.\"
tl: Am yaqooloonaf taraahu qul faatoo bi'ashri Suwarim mislihee muftarayaatinw wad'oo manis tata'tum min doonil laahi in kuntum saadiqeen

text: And if they do not respond to you - then know that it [i.e., the Qur’ān] was revealed with the knowledge of Allāh and that there is no deity except Him. Then, would you [not] be Muslims?
tl: Fa-il-lam yastajeeboo lakum fa'lamooo annamaaa unzilla bi'ilmil laahi Wa-al laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa fahal antum muslimoon

text: Whoever desires the life of this world and its adornments - We fully repay them for their deeds therein, and they therein will not be deprived.
tl: Man kaana yureedul hayaatad dunyaa zeenatahaa nuwaffi ilaihim a'maa-lahum feehaa Wa-hum feehaa laa yubkhasoon

text: Those are the ones for whom there is not in the Hereafter but the Fire. And lost is what they did therein, and worthless is what they used to do.
tl: Ulaaa'ikal lazeena laisa lahum fil Aakhirati illan Naaru Wa-habita maa sana'oo feehaa Wa-baatilum maa kaanoo ya'maloon

text: So is one who [stands] upon a clear evidence from his Lord [like the aforementioned]? And a witness from Him follows it, and before it was the Scripture of Moses to lead and as mercy. Those [believers in the former revelations] believe in it [i.e., the Qur’ān]. But whoever disbelieves in it from the [various] factions - the Fire is his promised destination. So be not in doubt about it. Indeed, it is the truth from your Lord, but most of the people do not believe.
tl: Afaman kaana 'ala baiyyinatim mir Rabbihee Wa-yatloohu shaahidum minhu Wa-min qablihee Kitaabu Moosaaa imaamanw Wa-rahmah; ulaaa-'ika yu'minoona bih; Wa-main yakfur bihee minal Ahzaabi fan-naaru maw'iduh; falaa taku fee miryatim minh; innahul haqqu mir Rabbika Wa-laakinna aksaran naasi laa yu'minoon

text: And who is more unjust than he who invents a lie about Allāh? Those will be presented before their Lord, and the witnesses will say, \"These are the ones who lied against their Lord.\" Unquestionably, the curse of Allāh is upon the wrongdoers
tl: Wa-man azlamu mimmanif taraa 'alal laahi kazibaa; ulaaa'ika yu'radoona 'alaa Rabbihim Wa-yaqoolul ashhaa duhaaa'ulaaa'il lazeena kazaboo 'alaa Rabbihim; alaa la'natul laahi alaz zaalimeen

text: Who averted [people] from the way of Allāh and sought to make it [seem] deviant while they, concerning the Hereafter, were disbelievers.
tl: Allazeena yasuddoona 'an sabeelil laahi Wa-yabghoonahaa 'iwajanw Wa-hum bil Aakhiratihum kaafiroon

text: Those were not causing failure [to Allāh] on earth, nor did they have besides Allāh any protectors. For them the punishment will be multiplied. They were not able to hear, nor did they see.
tl: Ulaaa'ika lam yakoonoo mu'jizeena fil ardi Wa-maa kaana lahum min doonil laahi min awliyaaa'; yudaa'afu lahumul 'azaab; maa kaanoo yastatee'oonas sam'a Wa-maa kaanoo yubsiroon

text: Those are the ones who will have lost themselves, and lost from them is what they used to invent.
tl: Ulaaa'ikal lazeena khasirooo anfusahum Wa-dalla 'anhum maa kaanoo yaftaroon

text: Assuredly, it is they in the Hereafter who will be the greatest losers.
tl: Laa jarama annahum fil Aakhirati humul akhsaroon

text: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds and humbled themselves to their Lord - those are the companions of Paradise; they will abide eternally therein.
tl: Innal lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati Wa-akhbatooo ilaa Rabbihim ulaaa'ika Ashaabul Jannati hum feehaa khaalidoon

text: The example of the two parties is like the blind and deaf, and the seeing and hearing. Are they equal in comparison? Then, will you not remember?
tl: Masalul fareeqaini kal-a'maa wal-asammi walbaseeri wassamee'; hal yastawiyaani masalaa; afalaa tazakkaroon

text: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, [saying], \"Indeed, I am to you a clear warner
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa Noohan ilaa qawmihee innee lakum nazeerum mubeen

text: That you not worship except Allāh. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a painful day.\"
tl: Al laa ta'budooo illal laaha inneee akhaafu 'alaikum 'azaaba Yawmin aleem

text: So the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, \"We do not see you but as a man like ourselves, and we do not see you followed except by those who are the lowest of us [and] at first suggestion. And we do not see in you over us any merit; rather, we think you are liars.\"
tl: Faqaalal mala-ul lazeena kafaroo min qawmihee ma naraaka illaa basharam mislanaa Wa-maa naraakat taba'aka illal lazeena hum araazilunaa baadiyar raayi Wa-maa naraa lakum 'alainaa min fadlim bal nazunnukum kaazibeen

text: He said, \"O my people, have you considered: if I should be upon clear evidence from my Lord while He has given me mercy from Himself but it has been made unapparent to you, should we force it upon you while you are averse to it?
tl: Qaala yaa-qawmi ara'aitum in kuntu 'alaa baiyyinatim mir Rabbee Wa-aataanee rahmatam min 'indihee fa'um-miyat 'alaikum anulzimuku-moohaa Wa-antum lahaa kaarihoon

text: And O my people, I ask not of you for it any wealth. My reward is not but from Allāh. And I am not one to drive away those who have believed. Indeed, they will meet their Lord, but I see that you are a people behaving ignorantly.
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi laaa as'alukum 'alaihi maalan in ajriya illaa 'alal laah; Wa-maaa ana bitaaridil lazeena aamanoo; innahum mulaaqoo Rabbihim Wa-laakinneee araakum qawman tajhaloon

text: And O my people, who would protect me from Allāh if I drove them away? Then will you not be reminded?
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi main yansurunee minal laahi in tarattuhum; afalaa tazak-karoon

text: And I do not tell you that I have the depositories [containing the provision] of Allāh or that I know the unseen, nor do I tell you that I am an angel, nor do I say of those upon whom your eyes look down that Allāh will never grant them any good. Allāh is most knowing of what is within their souls. Indeed, I would then be among the wrongdoers [i.e., the unjust].\"
tl: Wa-laa aqoolu lakum 'indee khazaa'inul laahi Wa-laaa a'lamul ghaiba Wa-laa aqoolu inee malakunw Wa-laaa aqoolu lillazeena tazdareee a'yunukum lai yu'tiyahumul laahu khairan Allaahu a'lamu bimaa feee anfusihim innee izal laminaz zaalimeen

text: They said, \"O Noah, you have disputed [i.e., opposed] us and been frequent in dispute of us. So bring us what you threaten us, if you should be of the truthful.\"
tl: Qaaloo yaa-Noohu qad jaadaltanaa fa-aksarta jidaalanaa faatinaa bimaa ta'idunaaa in kunta minas saadiqeen

text: He said, \"Allāh will only bring it to you if He wills, and you will not cause [Him] failure.
tl: Qaala innamaa yaateekum bihil laahu in shaaa'a Wa-maaa antum bimu'jizeen

text: And my advice will not benefit you - although I wished to advise you - if Allāh should intend to put you in error. He is your Lord, and to Him you will be returned.\"
tl: Wa-laa yanfa'ukum nusheee in arattu an ansaha lakum in kaanal laahu yureedu aien yughwi-yakum; Huwa Rabbukum Wa-ilaihi turja'oon

text: Or do they say [about Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)], \"He invented it\"? Say, \"If I have invented it, then upon me is [the consequence of] my crime; but I am innocent of what [crimes] you commit.\"
tl: Am yaqooloonaf taraahu qul inif taraituhoo fa'alaiya ijraamee Wa-ana bareee'um mimmaa tujrimoon

text: And it was revealed to Noah that, \"No one will believe from your people except those who have already believed, so do not be distressed by what they have been doing.
tl: Wa oohiya ilaa Noohin annahoo lany-yu'mina min qawmika illaa man qad aamana falaa tabta'is bimaa kaanoo yaf'aloon

text: And construct the ship under Our observation and Our inspiration and do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are [to be] drowned.\"
tl: Wasna'il fulka bi-a'yuninaa Wa-wahyinaa Wa-laa tukhaa-tibnee fil lazeena zalamoo; innahum mughraqoon

text: And he constructed the ship, and whenever an assembly of the eminent of his people passed by him, they ridiculed him. He said, \"If you ridicule us, then we will ridicule you just as you ridicule.
tl: Wa-yasna'ul fulka Wa-kullamaa marra 'alaihi mala'um min qawmihee sakhiroo minh; qaala in taskharoo minnaa fa-innaa naskharu minkum kamaa taskharoon

text: And you are going to know who will get a punishment that will disgrace him [on earth] and upon whom will descend an enduring punishment [in the Hereafter].\"
tl: Fasawfa ta'lamoona mai ya'teehi 'azaabuny yukhzeehi Wa-yahillu 'alaihi 'azaabun muqeem

text: [So it was], until when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, \"Load upon it [i.e., the ship] of each [creature] two mates and your family, except those about whom the word [i.e., decree] has preceded, and [include] whoever has believed.\" But none had believed with him, except a few.
tl: Hattaaa izaa jaaa'a amrunaa Wa-faarat tannooru qulnah mil feehaa min kullin zawjainis naini Wa-ahlaka illaa man sabaqa 'alaihil qawlu Wa-man aaman; Wa-maaa aamana ma'ahooo illaa qaleel

text: And [Noah] said, \"Embark therein; in the name of Allāh [are] its course and its anchorage. Indeed, my Lord is Forgiving and Merciful.\"
tl: Wa-qaalar kaboo feehaa bismil laahi majraihaa Wa-mursaahaa; inna Rabbee la-Ghafoorur Raheem

text: And it sailed with them through waves like mountains, and Noah called to his son who was apart [from them], \"O my son, come aboard with us and be not with the disbelievers.\"
tl: Wa-hiya tajree bihim fee mawjin kaljibaali Wa-naadaa Noohunib nahoo Wa-kaana fee ma'zilien yaa-bunai yarkam ma'anaa Wa-laa takum ma'al kaafireen

text: [But] he said, \"I will take refuge on a mountain to protect me from the water.\" [Noah] said, \"There is no protector today from the decree of Allāh, except for whom He gives mercy.\" And the waves came between them, and he was among the drowned.
tl: Qaala sa-aaweee ilaa jabalien ya'simunee minal maaa'; qaala laa 'aasimal yawma min amril laahi illaa mar rahim; Wa-haala bainahumal mawju fakaana minal mughraqeen

text: And it was said, \"O earth, swallow your water, and O sky, withhold [your rain].\" And the water subsided, and the matter was accomplished, and it [i.e., the ship] came to rest on the [mountain of] Jūdiyy. And it was said, \"Away with the wrongdoing people.\"
tl: Wa-qeela yaaa ardubla'ee maaa'aki Wa-yaa-samaaa'u aqli'ee Wa-gheedal maaa'u Wa-qudiyal amru wastawat 'alal joodiyyi Wa-qeela bu'dal lilqawmiz zaalimeen

text: And Noah called to his Lord and said, \"My Lord, indeed my son is of my family; and indeed, Your promise is true; and You are the most just of judges!\"
tl: Wa naadaa noohur Rabbahoo faqaala Rabbi innabnee min ahlee Wa-inna wa'dakal haqqu Wa-Anta ahkamul haakimeen

text: He said, \"O Noah, indeed he is not of your family; indeed, he is [one whose] work was other than righteous, so ask Me not for that about which you have no knowledge. Indeed, I advise you, lest you be among the ignorant.\"
tl: Qaala yaa-Noohu innahoo laisa min ahlika innahoo 'amalun ghairu saalihin falaa tas'alni maa laisa laka bihee 'ilmun inneee a'izuka an takoona minal jaahileen

text: [Noah] said, \"My Lord, I seek refuge in You from asking that of which I have no knowledge. And unless You forgive me and have mercy upon me, I will be among the losers.\"
tl: Qaala rabbi inneee a'oozu bika an as'alaka maa laisa lee bihee 'ilmunw Wa-illaa taghfir lee Wa-tarhamneee akum minal khaasireen

text: It was said, \"O Noah, disembark in security from Us and blessings upon you and upon nations [descending] from those with you. But other nations [of them] We will grant enjoyment; then there will touch them from Us a painful punishment.\"
tl: Qeela yaa-Noohuh bit bisalaamim minnaa Wa-barakaatin 'alaika Wa-'alaaa umamim mimmam ma'ak; Wa-umamun sanumatti'uhum summa yamassuhum minaa 'azaabun aleem

text: That is from the news of the unseen which We reveal to you, [O Muḥammad]. You knew it not, neither you nor your people, before this. So be patient; indeed, the [best] outcome is for the righteous.
tl: Tilka min ambaaa'il ghaibi nooheehaaa ilaika maa kunta ta'lamuhaaaa anta Wa-laa qawmuka min qabli haazaa fasbir innal 'aaqibata lilmuttaqeen

text: And to ʿAad [We sent] their brother Hūd. He said, \"O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. You are not but inventors [of falsehood].
tl: Wa-ilaa 'aadin akhaahum Hoodaa; qaala yaa-qawmi' budul laaha maa lakum min ilaahin ghairuhooo in antum illaa muftaroon

text: O my people, I do not ask you for it [i.e., my advice] any reward. My reward is only from the one who created me. Then will you not reason?
tl: Yaa-qawmi laaa as'alukum 'alaihi ajran in ajriya illaa 'alal lazee fataranee; afalaa ta'qiloon

text: And O my people, ask forgiveness of your Lord and then repent to Him. He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in showers and increase you in strength [added] to your strength. And do not turn away, [being] criminals.\"
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmis taghfiroo Rabbakum summa toobooo ilaihi yursilis samaaa'a 'alaikum midraaranw Wa-yazidkum quwwatan ilaa quwwatikum Wa-laa tatawallaw mujrimeen

text: They said, \"O Hūd, you have not brought us clear evidence, and we are not ones to leave our gods on your say-so. Nor are we believers in you.
tl: Qaaloo yaa-Hoodu maa ji'tanaa bibaiyinatinw Wa-maa nahnu bitaarikeee aalihatinaa 'an qawlika Wa-maa nahnu laka bimu'mineen

text: We only say that some of our gods have possessed you with evil [i.e., insanity].\" He said, \"Indeed, I call Allāh to witness, and witness [yourselves] that I am free from whatever you associate with Allāh
tl: In naqoolu illa' taraaka ba'du aalihatinaa bisooo'; qaala inneee ushhidul laaha wash-hadooo annee bareee'um mimmaa tushrikoon

text: Other than Him. So plot against me all together; then do not give me respite.
tl: Min doonihee fakeedoonee jamee'an summa laa tunziroon

text: Indeed, I have relied upon Allāh, my Lord and your Lord. There is no creature but that He holds it by its forelock [i.e., controls it]. Indeed, my Lord is on a path [that is] straight.
tl: Innee tawakkaltu 'alal laahi Rabbee Wa-Rabbikum; maa min daaabbatin illaa Huwa aakhizum binaasiyatihaa; inna Rabbee 'alaa Siraatim mustaqeem

text: But if you turn away, then I have already conveyed that with which I was sent to you. My Lord will give succession to a people other than you, and you will not harm Him at all. Indeed my Lord is, over all things, Guardian.\"
tl: Fa-in tawallaw faqad ablaghtukum maaa ursiltu biheee ilaikum; Wa-yastakhlifu Rabbee qawman ghairakum Wa-laa tadur-roonahoo shai'aa; inna Rabbee 'alaa kulli shai'in Hafeez

text: And when Our command came, We saved Hūd and those who believed with him, by mercy from Us; and We saved them from a harsh punishment.
tl: Wa-lammaa jaaa'a amrunaa naj-jainaa Hoodanw wallazeena aamanoo ma'ahoo birahmatim minnaa Wa-naj-jainaahum min 'azaabin ghaleez

text: And that was ʿAad, who rejected the signs of their Lord and disobeyed His messengers and followed the order of every obstinate tyrant.
tl: Wa-tilka 'aad, jahadoo bi-Aayaati Rabbihim Wa-'asaw Rusulahoo wattaba'ooo amra kulli jabbaarin 'aneed

text: And they were [therefore] followed in this world with a curse and [as well] on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, ʿAad denied their Lord; then away with ʿAad, the people of Hūd.
tl: Wa-utbi'oo fee haazihid dunyaa la'natanw Wa-Yawmal Qiyaamah; alaaa inna 'Aadan kafaroo Rabbahum; alaa bu'dal li-'Aadin qawmin Hood

text: And to Thamūd [We sent] their brother Ṣāliḥ. He said, \"O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. He has produced you from the earth and settled you in it, so ask forgiveness of Him and then repent to Him. Indeed, my Lord is near and responsive.\"
tl: Wa-ilaa Samooda akhaahum Saalihaa; qaala yaa-qawmi' budul laaha maa lakum min ilaahim ghairuhoo Huwa ansha-akum minal ardi wasta'-marakum feehaa fastaghfiroohu summa toobooo ilaih; inna Rabbee Qareebum Mujeeb

text: They said, \"O Ṣāliḥ, you were among us a man of promise before this. Do you forbid us to worship what our fathers worshipped? And indeed we are, about that to which you invite us, in disquieting doubt.\"
tl: Qaaloo yaa-Saalihu qad kunta feenaa marjuwwan qabla haazaaa atanhaanaaa an na'bu-da maa ya'budu aabaaa'unaa Wa-innanaa lafee shakkim mimmaa tad'oonaaa ilaihi mureeb

text: He said, \"O my people, have you considered: if I should be upon clear evidence from my Lord and He has given me mercy from Himself, who would protect me from Allāh if I disobeyed Him? So you would not increase me except in loss.
tl: Qaala yaa-qawmi ara'aytum in kuntu 'alaa baiyinatim mir Rabbee Wa-aataanee minhu rahmatan famai yansurunee minal laahi in 'asaituhoo famaa tazeedoonanee ghaira takhseer

text: And O my people, this is the she-camel of Allāh - [she is] to you a sign. So let her feed upon Allāh's earth and do not touch her with harm, or you will be taken by an impending punishment.\"
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi haazihee naaqatul laahi lakum aayatan fazaroohaa taakul feee ardil laahi Wa-laa tamassoohaa bisooo'in fa-yaakhuzakum azaabun qareeb

text: But they hamstrung her, so he said, \"Enjoy yourselves in your homes for three days. That is a promise not to be denied [i.e., unfailing].\"
tl: Fa-'aqaroohaa faqaala tamatta'oo fee daarikum salaasata aiy-yaamin zaalika wa'dun ghairu makzoob

text: So when Our command came, We saved Ṣāliḥ and those who believed with him, by mercy from Us, and [saved them] from the disgrace of that day. Indeed, it is your Lord who is the Powerful, the Exalted in Might.
tl: Falammaa jaaa'a amrunaa najjainaa Saalihanw wal-lazeena aamanoo ma'ahoo birahmatim minnaa Wa-min khizyi Yawmi'iz inna Rabbaka Huwal Qawiyyul 'Azeez

text: And the shriek seized those who had wronged, and they became within their homes [corpses] fallen prone
tl: Wa-akhazal lazeena zalamus saihatu fa-asbahoo fee diyaarihim jaasimeen

text: As if they had never prospered therein. Unquestionably, Thamūd denied their Lord; then, away with Thamūd.
tl: Ka-al lam yaghnaw feehaaa; alaaa inna Samooda kafaroo Rabbahum; alaa bu'dal li-Samood

text: And certainly did Our messengers [i.e., angels] come to Abraham with good tidings; they said, \"Peace.\" He said, \"Peace,\" and did not delay in bringing [them] a roasted calf.
tl: Wa-laqad jaaa'at Rusulunaaa Ibraaheema bilbushraa qaaloo salaaman qaala salaamun famaa labisa an jaaa'a bi'ij-lin haneez

text: But when he saw their hands not reaching for it, he distrusted them and felt from them apprehension. They said, \"Fear not. We have been sent to the people of Lot.\"
tl: Falammaa ra-aaa aidiyahum laa tasilu ilaihi nakirahum Wa-awjasa minhum kheefah; qaaloo laa takhaf innaaa ursilnaaa ilaa qawmi Loot

text: And his wife was standing, and she smiled. Then We gave her good tidings of Isaac and after Isaac, Jacob.
tl: Wamra-atuhoo qaaa'imatun fadahikat fabashsharnaahaa bi-Iss-haaqa Wa-minw waraaa'i Iss-haaqa Ya'qoob

text: She said, \"Woe to me! Shall I give birth while I am an old woman and this, my husband, is an old man? Indeed, this is an amazing thing!\"
tl: Qaalat yaa-wailataaa 'aalidu Wa-ana 'ajoozunw Wa-haaza ba'lee shaikhan inna haazaa lashai'un 'ajeeb

text: They said, \"Are you amazed at the decree of Allāh? May the mercy of Allāh and His blessings be upon you, people of the house. Indeed, He is Praiseworthy and Honorable.\"
tl: Qaalooo ata'jabeena min amril laahi rahmatul laahi Wa-barakaatuhoo 'alaikum Ahlal Bayt; innahoo Hameedun Majeed

text: And when the fright had left Abraham and the good tidings had reached him, he began to argue [i.e., plead] with Us concerning the people of Lot.
tl: Falammaa zahaba an Ibraaheemar raw'u Wa-jaaa'at hul-bushraaa yujaadilunaa fee qawmi Loot

text: Indeed, Abraham was forbearing, grieving and [frequently] returning [to Allāh].
tl: Inna Ibraaheema la-haleemun awwaahun muneeb

text: [The angels said], \"O Abraham, give up this [plea]. Indeed, the command of your Lord has come, and indeed, there will reach them a punishment that cannot be repelled.\"
tl: Yaaa-Ibraaheemu a'rid 'an haazaaa innahoo qad jaaa'a amru Rabbika Wa-innahum aateehim 'azaabun ghairun mardood

text: And when Our messengers, [the angels], came to Lot, he was anguished for them and felt for them great discomfort and said, \"This is a trying day.\"
tl: Wa-lammaa jaaa'at Rusulunaa Lootan seee'a bihim Wa-daaqa bihim zar'anw Wa-qaala haazaa yawmun 'aseeb

text: And his people came hastening to him, and before [this] they had been doing evil deeds. He said, \"O my people, these are my daughters; they are purer for you. So fear Allāh and do not disgrace me concerning my guests. Is there not among you a man of reason?\"
tl: Wa-jaaa'ahoo qawmuhoo yuhra'oona ilaihi Wa-min qablu kaanoo ya'maloonas saiyyiaat; qaala yaa-qawmi haaa'ulaaa'i banaatee hunna atharu lakum fattaqul laaha Wa-laa tukhzooni fee daifee alaisa minkum rajulur rasheed

text: They said, \"You have already known that we have not concerning your daughters [i.e., women] any claim [i.e., desire], and indeed, you know what we want.\"
tl: Qaaloo laqad 'alimta maa lanaa fee banaatika min haqq, Wa-innaka lata'lamu maa nureed

text: He said, \"If only I had against you some power or could take refuge in a strong support.\"
tl: Qaala law anna lee bikum quwwatan aw aaweee ilaa ruknin shadeed

text: They [the angels] said, \"O Lot, indeed we are messengers of your Lord; [therefore], they will never reach you. So set out with your family during a portion of the night and let not any among you look back - except your wife; indeed, she will be struck by that which strikes them. Indeed, their appointment is [for] the morning. Is not the morning near?\"
tl: Qaaloo yaa-Lootu innaa Rusulu Rabbika lain yasiloo ilaika fa-asri bi-ahlika biqit-'im minal laili Wa-laa yaltafit minkum ahadun illam ra-ataka innahoo museebuhaa maaa asaabahum; inna maw'i-dahumus subh; alaisas subhu biqareeb

text: So when Our command came, We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of layered hard clay, [which were]
tl: Falammaa jaaa'a amrunaa ja'alnaa 'aaliyahaa saafilahaa Wa-amtamaa 'alaihaa hijaaratam min sijjeelim mandood

text: Marked from your Lord. And it [i.e., Allāh's punishment] is not from the wrongdoers [very] far.
tl: Musawwamatan 'inda Rabbik; Wa-maa hiya minaz zaalimena biba'eed

text: And to Madyan [We sent] their brother Shuʿayb. He said, \"O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. And do not decrease from the measure and the scale. Indeed, I see you in prosperity, but indeed, I fear for you the punishment of an all-encompassing Day.
tl: Wa-ilaa Madyana akhaahum Shu'aibaa; qaala yaa-qawmi' budul laaha maa lakum min ilaahin ghairuhoo Wa-laa tanqusul mikyaala walmeezaan; inneee araakum bikhairinw Wa-innee akhaafu 'alaikum 'azaaba Yawmim muheet

text: And O my people, give full measure and weight in justice and do not deprive the people of their due and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption.
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi awful mikyaala walmeezaana bilqisti Wa-laa tabkhasun naasa ashyaaa'ahum Wa-laa ta'saw fil ardi mufsideen

text: What remains [lawful] from Allāh is best for you, if you would be believers. But I am not a guardian over you.\"
tl: Baqiyyatul laahi khairul lakum in kuntum mu'mineen; Wa-maa ana 'alaikum bihafeez

text: They said, \"O Shuʿayb, does your prayer [i.e., religion] command you that we should leave what our fathers worship or not do with our wealth what we please? Indeed, you are the forbearing, the discerning!\"
tl: Qaaloo yaa-Shu'aybu 'a-salaatuka ta'muruka an natruka maa ya'budu aabaaa'unaaa aw an naf'ala feee amwaalinaa maa nashaaa'oo innaka la-antal haleemur rasheed

text: He said, \"O my people, have you considered: if I am upon clear evidence from my Lord and He has provided me with a good provision from Him...? And I do not intend to differ from you in that which I have forbidden you; I only intend reform as much as I am able. And my success is not but through Allāh. Upon Him I have relied, and to Him I return.
tl: Qaala yaa qawmi ara'aitum in kuntu 'alaa baiyinatim mir Rabbee Wa-razaqanee minhu rizqan hasanaa; Wa-maaa ureedu an ukhaalifakum ilaa maaa anhaakum 'anh; in ureedu illal islaaha mastata't; Wa-maa tawfeeqeee illaa billaah; 'alaihi tawakkaltu Wa-ilaihi uneeb

text: And O my people, let not [your] dissension from me cause you to be struck by that similar to what struck the people of Noah or the people of Hūd or the people of Ṣāliḥ. And the people of Lot are not from you far away.
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi laa yajri-mannakum shiqaaqeee aien yuseebakum mislu maaa asaaba qawma Noohin aw qawma Hoodin aw qawma Saalih; Wa-maa qawmu Lootim minkum biba'eed

text: And ask forgiveness of your Lord and then repent to Him. Indeed, my Lord is Merciful and Affectionate.\"
tl: Wastaghfiroo Rabbakum summa toobooo ilaih; inna Rabbee Raheemunw Wadood

text: They said, \"O Shuʿayb, we do not understand much of what you say, and indeed, we consider you among us as weak. And if not for your family, we would have stoned you [to death]; and you are not to us one respected.\"
tl: Qaaloo yaa-Shu'aibu maa nafqahu kaseeram mimmaa taqoolu Wa-innaa lanaraaka feenaa da'eefanw Wa-law-laa rahtuka larajamnaaka Wa-maaa anta 'alainaa bi'azeez

text: He said, \"O my people, is my family more respected for power by you than Allāh? But you put Him behind your backs [in neglect]. Indeed, my Lord is encompassing of what you do.
tl: Qaala yaa-qawmi arahteee a'azzu 'alaikum minal laahi wattakhaztumoohu waraaa'akum zihriyyan inna Rabbee bimaa ta'maloona muheet

text: And O my people, work according to your position; indeed, I am working. You are going to know to whom will come a punishment that will disgrace him and who is a liar. So watch; indeed, I am with you a watcher, [awaiting the outcome].\"
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi' maloo 'alaa makaanatikum innee 'aamilun sawfa ta'lamoona many ya'teehi 'azaabuny yukhzeehi Wa-man huwa kaazib; wartaqibooo innnee ma'akum raqeeb

text: And when Our command came, We saved Shuʿayb and those who believed with him, by mercy from Us. And the shriek seized those who had wronged, and they became within their homes [corpses] fallen prone
tl: Wa-lammaa jaaa'a amrunaa najjainaa shu'aibanw wal-lazeena aamanoo ma'ahoo birahmatim minnaa Wa-akhazatil lazeena zalamus saihatu fa-asbahoo fee diyaarihim jaasimeen

text: As if they had never prospered therein. Then, away with Madyan as Thamūd was taken away.
tl: Ka-al lam yaghnaw feehaaa; alaa bu'dal li-Madyana Kamaa ba'idat Samood

text: And We did certainly send Moses with Our signs and a clear authority
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa Moosaa bi-Aayaatinaa Wa-sultaanim mubeen

text: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they followed the command of Pharaoh, and the command of Pharaoh was not [at all] discerning.
tl: Ilaa Fir'awna Wa-mala'ihee fattaba'ooo amra Fir'awna Wa-maaa amru Fir'awna birasheed

text: He will precede his people on the Day of Resurrection and lead them into the Fire; and wretched is the place to which they are led.
tl: Yaqdumu qawmahoo Yawmal Qiyaamati fa-awrada-humun Naara Wa-bi'sal wirdul mawrood

text: And they were followed in this [world] with a curse and on the Day of Resurrection. And wretched is the gift which is given.
tl: Wa-utbi'oo fee haazihee la'natanw Wa-Yawmal Qiyaamah; bi'sar rifdul marfood

text: That is from the news of the cities, which We relate to you; of them, some are [still] standing and some are [as] a harvest [mowed down].
tl: Zaalika min ambaaa'il quraa naqussuhoo 'alaika minhaa qaaa'imunw Wa-haseed

text: And We did not wrong them, but they wronged themselves. And they were not availed at all by their gods which they invoked other than Allāh when there came the command of your Lord. And they did not increase them in other than ruin.
tl: Wa-maa zalamnaahum Wa-laakin zalamooo anfusahum famaaa aghnat 'anhum aalihatuhumul latee yad'oona min doonil laahi min shai'il lammaa jaaa'a amru Rabbika Wa-maa zaadoohum ghaira tatbeeb

text: And thus is the seizure of your Lord when He seizes the cities while they are committing wrong. Indeed, His seizure is painful and severe.
tl: Wa-kazaalika akhzu Rabbika izaaa akhazal quraa Wa-hiya zaalimah; inna akhzahooo aleemun shadeed

text: Indeed in that is a sign for those who fear the punishment of the Hereafter. That is a Day for which the people will be collected, and that is a Day [which will be] witnessed.
tl: Inna fee zaalika la-aayatal liman khaafa 'azaabal Aakhirah; zaalika Yawmum majmoo'ul lahun naasu Wa-zaalika Yawmum mashhood

text: And We do not delay it except for a limited term.
tl: Wa-maa nu'akhkhiruhooo illaa li-ajalim ma'dood

text: The Day it comes no soul will speak except by His permission. And among them will be the wretched and the prosperous.
tl: Yawma yaati laa takallamu nafsun illaa bi-iznih; faminhum shaqiyyunw Wa-sa'eed

text: As for those who were [destined to be] wretched, they will be in the Fire. For them therein is [violent] exhaling and inhaling.
tl: Fa-ammal lazeena shaqoo fafin Naari lahum feehaa zafeerunw Wa-shaheeq

text: [They will be] abiding therein as long as the heavens and the earth endure, except what your Lord should will. Indeed, your Lord is an effecter of what He intends.
tl: Khaalideena feehaa maa daamatis samaawaatu wal-ardu illaa maa shaaa'a Rabbuk; inna Rabbaka fa'-'aalul limaa yureed

text: And as for those who were [destined to be] prosperous, they will be in Paradise, abiding therein as long as the heavens and the earth endure, except what your Lord should will - a bestowal uninterrupted.
tl: Wa-ammal lazeena su'idoo fafil Jannati khaalideena feehaa maa daamatis samaawaatu wal-ardu illaa maa shaaa'a Rabbuk; ataaa'an ghaira majzooz

text: So do not be in doubt, [O Muḥammad], as to what these [polytheists] are worshipping. They worship not except as their fathers worshipped before. And indeed, We will give them their share undiminished.
tl: Falaa taku fee miryatim mimmmaa ya'budu haaa'ulaaa'; maa ya'budoona illaa kamaa ya'budu aabaaa'uhum min qabl; Wa-innaa lamuwaf-foohum naseebahum ghaira manqoos

text: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture, but it came under disagreement. And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, it would have been judged between them. And indeed they are, concerning it [i.e., the Qur’ān], in disquieting doubt.
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Moosal Kitaaba fakhtulifa feeh; Wa-law-laa Kalimatun sabaqat mir Rabbika laqudiya bainahum; Wa-innahum lafee shakkim minhu mureeb

text: And indeed, each [of the believers and disbelievers] - your Lord will fully compensate them for their deeds. Indeed, He is Aware of what they do.
tl: Wa-inna kullal lammaa la-yuwaffiyannahum Rabbuka a'maalahum; innahoo bimaa ya'maloona Khabeer

text: So remain on a right course as you have been commanded, [you] and those who have turned back with you [to Allāh], and do not transgress. Indeed, He is Seeing of what you do.
tl: Fastaqim kamaaa umirta Wa-man taaba ma'aka Wa-laa tatghaw; innahoo bimaa ta'maloona Baseer

text: And do not incline toward those who do wrong, lest you be touched by the Fire, and you would not have other than Allāh any protectors; then you would not be helped.
tl: Wa-laa tarkanooo ilal lazeena zalamoo fatamassa-kumun Naaru Wa-maa lakum min doonil laahi min awliyaaa'a summa laa tunsaroon

text: And establish prayer at the two ends of the day and at the approach of the night. Indeed, good deeds do away with misdeeds. That is a reminder for those who remember.
tl: Wa-aqimis Salaata tarafayin nahaari Wa-zulafam minal layl; innal hasanaati yuzhibnas saiyi-aat; zaalika zikraa liz-zaakireen

text: And be patient, for indeed, Allāh does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good.
tl: Wasbir fa-innal laaha laa yudee'u ajral muhsineen

text: So why were there not among the generations before you those of enduring discrimination forbidding corruption on earth - except a few of those We saved from among them? But those who wronged pursued what luxury they were given therein, and they were criminals.
tl: Falaw-laa kaana minal qurooni min qablikum ooloo baqiyyatiny yanhawna 'anil fasaadi fil ardi illaa qaleelam mimman anjainaa minhum; wattaba'al lazeena zalamoo maaa utrifoo feehi Wa-kaanoo mujrimeen

text: And your Lord would not have destroyed the cities unjustly while their people were reformers.
tl: Wa-maa kaana Rabbuka liyuhlikal quraa bizulminw Wa-ahluhaa muslihoon

text: And if your Lord had willed, He could have made mankind one community; but they will not cease to differ,
tl: Wa-law shaaa'a Rabbuka laja'al annnaasa ummatanw waa-hidatanw Wa-laa yazaaloona mukhtalifeen

text: Except whom your Lord has given mercy, and for that He created them. But the word of your Lord is to be fulfilled that, \"I will surely fill Hell with jinn and men all together.\"
tl: Illaa mar rahima Rabbuk; Wa-lizaalika khalaqahum; Wa-tammat Kalimatu Rabbika la-amla'ana Jahannama minal jinnati wannnaasi ajma'een

text: And each [story] We relate to you from the news of the messengers is that by which We make firm your heart. And there has come to you, in this, the truth and an instruction and a reminder for the believers.
tl: Wa-kullan naqussu 'alaika min ambaaa'ir Rusuli maa nusabbitu bihee fu'aadak; Wa-jaaa'aka fee haazihil haqqu Wa-maw'izatunw Wa-zikraa lilmu'-mineen

text: And say to those who do not believe, \"Work according to your position; indeed, we are working.
tl: Wa-qul lillazeena laa yu'minoo na'maloo 'alaa makaanatikum innaa 'aamiloon

text: And wait; indeed, we are waiting.\"
tl: Wantaziroo innaa mun-taziroon

text: And to Allāh belong the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth and to Him will be returned the matter, all of it, so worship Him and rely upon Him. And your Lord is not unaware of that which you do.
tl: Wa-lillaahi ghaibus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-ilaihi yurja'ul amru kulluhoo fa'bud-hu Wa-tawakkal 'alaih; Wa-maa Rabbuka bighaafilin 'ammaa ta'maloon
